an le-—Fehoash: slain—Amaziah succeedim. N the seventh year of Jehu, Je- ‘hoash began to reign; and forty years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name. was Zibiah» of Beer-sheba.
AS MUCH AS THEY CAN BEAR. I.e., more than they were entitled to for the money they had brought him.
